2603.25697.title: The Kitchen Loop: User-Spec-Driven Development for a Self-Evolving Codebase
2603.25697.paper_summary: Code production is now a commodity; the bottleneck is knowing what to build and proving it works. We present the Kitchen Loop, a framework for autonomous, self-evolving software built on a unified trust model: (1) a specification surface enumerating what the product claims to support; (2) 'As a User x 1000', where an LLM agent exercises that surface as a synthetic power user at 1,000x human cadence; (3) Unbeatable Tests, ground-truth verification the code author cannot fake; and (4) Drift Control, continuous quality measurement with automated pause gates. We validate across two production systems over 285+ iterations, producing 1,094+ merged pull requests with zero regressions detected by the regression oracle (methodology in Section 6.1). We observe emergent properties at scale: multi-iteration self-correction chains, autonomous infrastructure healing, and monotonically improving quality gates. The primitives are not new; our contribution is their composition into a production-tested system with the operational discipline that makes long-running autonomous evolution safe.
2603.25697.paper_summary_zh: 程式碼的生產現在已成為一種商品；瓶頸在於知道該建造什麼並證明其有效性。我們提出了廚房循環（Kitchen Loop），這是一個基於統一信任模型的自主自我演化軟體框架： (1) 一個列舉產品聲稱支持的規範表面； (2) “作為用戶 x 1000”，其中 LLM 代理以 1,000 倍人類步調作為合成重度使用者來運用該表面； (3) 無可匹敵的測試，真實驗證程式碼作者無法偽造的；以及 (4) 漂移控制，通過自動暫停閘進行持續品質測量。我們在兩個生產系統中進行了 285 次以上的迭代驗證，產生了 1,094 個以上的合併拉取請求，回歸神諭（regression oracle）未檢測到任何回歸（方法論見第 6.1 節）。我們觀察到在規模上出現的特性：多次迭代自我修正鏈、自主基礎設施修復以及單調改善的品質閘。這些基本元素並不新穎；我們的貢獻在於將它們組合成一個經過生產測試的系統，並具備使長期自主演化安全的運營紀律。
2603.25697.author: Yannick Roy et.al.
